title: leucas masaiensis var. venulosa
intro: Leucas masaiensis var. venulosa, also known as East African Hyptis, is a plant species found in the tropical and subtropical regions of East Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Leucas masaiensis var. venulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
